focus: Normalized reuse matrix and adoption plan
noveltyJustification: Two of eight findings are new exhaustive-coverage or contradiction-resolution results, four consolidate partially new file-level decisions, and the normalized matrix receives the 0.10 simplicity bonus for collapsing conflicting verdicts into one owner/action model.
keyQuestions: How does every Hallmark verb and reference asset map to an existing sk-design mode, command, or reference, and what verdict applies?
Which design.md extraction fields, motion/theme ideas, and curated-theme mechanics improve sk-design's existing MD-generator, styles pipeline, foundations, and motion modes?
Which roadmap ideas justify new commands or capabilities, especially redesign/variant, and what phased adoption order has the best value-to-effort ratio?
answeredQuestions: Complete asset mapping and a concrete adoption order are now evidence-backed.
ruledOut: Wholesale replacement of the canon-conformant five-mode hub or addition of a sixth mode
New standalone redesign, study, variant, or explain commands
Copying the twenty named themes, exact token values, motion multipliers, 21 macrostructure recipes, 50 component packets, CSS stamps, or persistent Hallmark novelty log
Copying or hotlinking third-party material whose rights are not established by Hallmark's MIT file
Replacing v3 DESIGN.md, canonical JSON, sidecars, and validators with Hallmark's compact portable file
A Nanobanana-specific integration, Plate preset, or dedicated live-preview MCP inside sk-design
Sound/haptic policy without a concrete platform and accessibility need

title: MIT permits reuse with notice, but surgical independent adaptation is preferred
summary: Retain the complete Hallmark copyright and permission notice for copied or substantial portions; do not assume third-party imagery, quotations, logos, or vendor material is covered.

title: Four Hallmark verbs map to the shipped five-mode hub
summary: Strengthen Interface, Foundations, Audit, Motion, and MD-generator owners; do not add a sixth mode or duplicate redesign/study commands.

title: Seven missing anti-slop probes deserve first-tranche adoption
summary: Add the seven priority presentation probes while preserving evidence-first P0-P3 severity rather than a universal 58-of-58 score.

title: Composition DNA, authorization, origin, and measured motion improve extraction
summary: Extend the v3 measured contract with optional compositionDNA, extractionAuthorization, originClass, and conditional Motion while keeping authored brand invention separate.

title: Curated themes complement the corpus as facets, not presets
summary: Use evidence-derived directionArchetype and compact retrieval facets plus semantic motionCharacter; do not import twenty named themes or exact tokens.

title: Nested catalogs contribute selective-loading architecture
summary: Independently author a smaller structural-fingerprint card set using index-plus-selected-card loading; do not import the 21 macrostructures or 50 implementation packets.

title: Brand-first authoring is the only genuinely new public capability
summary: If pursued, create a distinct authored brand-system lane and artifact contract that cannot be confused with measured DESIGN.md; route other roadmap ideas into existing owners.
